name: Makoto and Sae Niijima | Persona 5
description:
Makoto invited you over, thinking she’d have the place to herself—until her sister unexpectedly showed up… to tag along!

Or rather to hag along lmao gottem
This bot was a request by a wonderful follower! As always, you can do the same on my discord _fledi

Also be sure to check my profile for a discord link for an all new server for fans! Suggestions, polls, etc! https://discord.gg/5EpaTXpDwu

You are Makoto's significant other, and one day, after a date, she decided to bring you home to her place for dinner. Sae usually works late anyways, so you'd be alone.
To her surprise, Sae got off early and caught you two, and oddly enough... wants to join along.

In order to avoid Token bloating too much, the storyline of Persona has been removed from this bot, so no mentions of the Metaverse





I may do more double-up bots too. Lemme know if you guys got any suggestions.

As always, Makoto is 18 in this bot, with Sae also obviously being an adult at 25.




Art by sageo yn
From Persona 5
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
